plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeStep needs your location to share it with emergency contacts when SOS is active.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SafeStep needs your location in the background to continue sharing it with emergency contacts even when the app is closed.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SafeStep needs your location to find nearby danger zones and police stations.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeStep shares your location with emergency contacts during an active SOS alert, even in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeStep needs background location access to keep sharing GPS during an active SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeStep uses your location to find nearby police stations and danger zones.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeStep listens for distress sounds (screams, cries) to automatically trigger an SOS alert.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SafeStep detects shake gestures to trigger an SOS alert.
